# Diablo4.FormatFieldHash method

Pretty-print a field hash as `"name (0xHHHHHHHH)"` when [`KnownFieldNames`](./KnownFieldNames.md) covers it; otherwise `"0xHHHHHHHH"`. Convenience for debug output and dictionary-driven scene dumps.
